sglang.bodyExcerpt:
support compact tree mask version
class TreeMaskMode(IntEnum):

    QLEN_ONLY = 1
    QLEN_ONLY_BITPACKING = 2

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix missing per_act_token parameter in compressed_tensors_moe
vllm.author: luccafong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix maverick serving broken issue from refactor PR #19636.
per_act_token was added in cutlass_moe_fp8 in PR #19636, but not passed in in some caller (e.g. CompressedTensorsW8A8Fp8MoECutlassMethod) and not given default value, causing failure,
e.g.

  
    
      vllm/vllm/model_executor/laye

vllm.title: [TPU][Bugfix] fix the MoE OOM issue
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The XLA backend for TPUs handles its own functionalization, so we don't need to wrap it as a custom operation to benefit from torch.compile's auto-functionalization. Additionally, using a custom operation would cause HBM OOM errors on TPU.
Test Plan
vllm serve mistralai/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct
